Description: Rank measure based on fundamental and technical metrics, focused on the very short-term (1-2 week) trading horizon, reflecting buy/sell signal strength
% of analysts giving a buy recommendation
No. of analysts covering the stock
% of analysts revising their price target downwards
Standard deviation of FY1 earnings estimate
Change in mean earnings estimate divided by weekend price
Current quarter earnings surprise
Difference between FY1 earnings estimate and last 4 quarters' earnings.
Median analyst expected growth in operating earnings over next full business cycle
The difference between the number of analysts raising and lowering FY1 earnings estimates as a percentage of analyst coverage
Buy - Sell recommendations as % of total recommendations
Analyst price target increases minus decreases over the past 4 weeks as a percentage of the total number of price targets
Sell recommendations as a % of total recommendations
% of analysts revising their price target upwards
Rank measure based on fundamental and technical metrics, emphasizing longer-term (1-2 year) value/fundamental investing prospects
A composite sentiment score summarizing analyst estimates, revisions, recommendations, and dispersion, used as a buy/sell/neutral indicator
Percentage of analyst recommendations that are "buy," divided by the total number of recommendations for the stock
Total number of analysts currently covering the stock with either recommendations or earnings estimates
Percentage of analysts who have revised their price target downwards out of the total covering analysts during the recent period
Standard deviation of analyst estimates of next fiscal year earnings, measuring dispersion or disagreement among analysts
Change in the average earnings estimate (usually for next year) over the past month, scaled by the stock's week-end price
The difference between the most recent actual reported earnings and the consensus analyst estimate for the quarter, possibly expressed relative to price
Difference between the current mean estimate of next fiscal year earnings and the sum of actual earnings over the last four quarters
Median of analysts’ estimates for the company's operating earnings growth over the next full business cycle (typically 3-5 years)
Rank measure based on a blend of fundamental and technical metrics, focused on a medium-term (2-3 month) investment horizon for equity style factors
Difference between the number of analysts raising and lowering next fiscal year earnings estimates, expressed as a percentage of total analyst coverage
Percentage difference between analysts giving "buy" recommendations and those giving "sell" recommendations, as a proportion of all recommendations
Difference between number of analysts raising and lowering price targets over last four weeks, divided by the total number of price targets, giving a net percentage
Percentage of analyst recommendations that are "sell," divided by the total number of recommendations for the stock
Percentage of analysts who have revised their price target upwards out of the total number of analysts covering the stock during the recent period
